title: Theme: Family and Relationships
description: Vocabulary for describing family members and relationships.

sentences.spanish: Mi tía habla con la familia los fines de semana.
sentences.english: My aunt talks with the family on weekends.

sentences.spanish: Nuestro abuelo habla con la familia a menudo.
sentences.english: Our grandfather talks with the family often.

sentences.spanish: Su primo quiere a la familia los fines de semana.
sentences.english: His/her cousin loves the family on weekends.

sentences.spanish: Su primo ayuda a la familia a menudo.
sentences.english: His/her cousin helps the family often.

sentences.spanish: La suegra visita a el nieto todos los días.
sentences.english: The mother-in-law visits the grandson every day.

sentences.spanish: Mi tía ayuda a su sobrino a menudo.
sentences.english: My aunt helps his/her nephew often.

sentences.spanish: Mi tía quiere a los gemelos en casa.
sentences.english: My aunt loves the twins at home.

sentences.spanish: Mi tía abraza a mi cuñado los fines de semana.
sentences.english: My aunt hugs my brother-in-law on weekends.

hermano.mnemonic: Her man, no! That's my brother!

suegro.mnemonic: Sue-grow. You hope your relationship with your in-laws will grow.
